title: ternstroemia emarginata
intro: Ternstroemia emarginata is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia, particularly in the Philippines and Indonesia, belonging to the family Theaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Ternstroemia emarginata are said to include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and antiseptic. Ternstroemia emarginata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it has also been used in traditional folk medicine to make herbal remedies such as teas, tonics, and salves.
